results.rendered_html:
ānūpa a. (pī f.) [anūpadeśe bhava, aṇ]
1 Watery, marshy, wet.
2 Produced in a marshy place.
— paḥ Any animal frequenting marshy or watery places (as a buffalo); ˚māṃsaṃ the flesh of such animals.
